description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

You pause and take a quick breath to stabilize your emotions. Choose any emotional state for your soulfeel.

Special You can Center Your Emotions as a free action if you're a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Court of Dance Moyishuu] who chooses joy, a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Court of Fields Moyishuu] who chooses wonder, a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Court of Flames Moyishuu] who chooses fury, or a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Court of Song Moyishuu] who chooses sorrow.
